customer_anxiety_profile: Low anxiety on this call. Ben was cooperative and engaged once Tyke established the Sebastian connection. No resistance signals, no expressed concerns about solar or the process.
unresolved_concerns: No-driving/at-computer expectation was not set — Ben has not been anchored on the appointment format requirements.
exact_promises_rep_made: Text confirmation will be sent after the call so Sebastian is not 'popping up out of the blue.'
Appointment rescheduled for Thursday the 31st at 9AM.
closer_should_know: Ben already has a relationship with Sebastian and expects to be meeting with him specifically. The reschedule was smooth and Ben was cooperative, but the button-up was incomplete — he was not told to be at his computer or not driving. Sebastian should confirm those logistics at the top of the appointment call before diving into the design.
